question: Who are all the Presidents of France?
¿Quiénes son todos los Presidentes de Francia?
Which actor appeared in the most films in a single decade?
¿Qué actor apareció en la mayor cantidad de películas en una sola década?
Who (either an actor or a musician) has received the highest number of awards?
¿Quién (ya sea un actor o un músico) ha recibido el mayor número de premios?
Which are the 5 bands or musicians who have produced the highest number of albums?
generated:
SELECT ?artist (COUNT(?album) AS ?albumCount) WHERE {
  ?album dbo:artist ?artist .
  ?album a dbo:Album .
  ?artist a dbo:Band .
} GROUP BY ?artist
ORDER BY DESC(?albumCount)
LIMIT 5

question: ¿Cuáles son las 5 bandas o músicos que han producido el mayor número de álbumes?
generated:
SELECT ?artist ?artistLabel (COUNT(?album) AS ?albumCount) WHERE {
  ?album dbo:artist ?artist .
  ?album a dbo:Album .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?artistLabel .
  FILTER (lang(?artistLabel) = "es" || lang(?artistLabel) = "en")
} GROUP BY ?artist ?artistLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?albumCount)
LIMIT 5

question: Which are the top 3 taxonomic kingdoms that have the largest number of endangered species?
generated:
SELECT ?kingdom (COUNT(?species) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?species dbo:conservationStatus ?status .
  FILTER (lcase(str(?status)) = "en" || lcase(str(?status)) = "e" )
  ?species dbo:kingdom ?kingdom .
} GROUP BY ?kingdom
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 3

In which settlement was the wife of Barack Obama born?
golden:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?uri
WHERE {
  res:Barack_Obama dbo:spouse ?x .
  ?x dbo:birthPlace ?uri .
  ?uri rdf:type dbo:Settlement .
}
generated: SELECT ?birthPlace WHERE { dbr:Michelle_Obama dbo:birthPlace ?birthPlace . } LIMIT 10

Who are footballers coached by Pep Guardiola?
generated:
SELECT DISTINCT ?footballer WHERE {
  dbr:Pep_Guardiola dbo:managerClub ?club .
  ?footballer dbo:team ?club .
  ?footballer rdf:type dbo:SoccerPlayer .
  FILTER(?club IN (dbr:FC_Barcelona, dbr:FC_Bayern_Munich, dbr:FC_Barcelona_B))
}
ORDER BY ?footballer

question: ¿Qué futbolistas han sido entrenados por Pep Guardiola?

Which alliance has the most member airlines?
golden:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
SELECT ?uri
WHERE {
  ?airline a dbo:Airline .
  ?airline dbp:alliance ?uri .
}
GROUP BY ?uri
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?airline))
OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1
generated: SELECT ?alliance (COUNT(DISTINCT ?member) AS ?memberCount) WHERE { VALUES ?alliance { dbr:Star_Alliance dbr:Oneworld dbr:SkyTeam } ?member dbo:alliance ?alliance . } GROUP BY ?alliance ORDER BY DESC(?memberCount)

question: ¿Qué alianza tiene la mayor cantidad de aerolíneas miembros?
golden:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
SELECT ?uri
WHERE {
  ?airline a dbo:Airline .
  ?airline dbp:alliance ?uri .
}
GROUP BY ?uri
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?airline))
OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1
generated:
SELECT ?alliance WHERE {
  ?airline rdf:type dbo:Airline .
  ?airline dbo:alliance ?alliance .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?alliance), "http://dbpedia.org/resource/"))
}
GROUP BY ?alliance
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?airline))
LIMIT 1

Which other firearms were designed by the creator of the AK-47?
golden:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE {
  ?uri rdf:type dbo:Weapon .
  ?uri dbp:designer ?x .
  res:AK-47 dbp:designer ?x .
  FILTER (?uri != res:AK-47)
}
generated: SELECT DISTINCT ?firearm WHERE { ?firearm dbp:designer dbr:Mikhail_Kalashnikov ; rdf:type dbo:Weapon . FILTER(?firearm != dbr:AK-47) } ORDER BY ?firearm

PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE {
